title: elymus × saxicola
intro: Elymus × saxicola, also known as the saxicolous wildrye or hybrid wildrye, is a hybrid grass species created by crossing Elymus virginicus with Elymus caninus. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus × saxicola include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and is also used in some commercial health supplements.
